name: open-personal-agent
description: A modern AI-powered personal agent application built with React and powered by Anthropic Claude

scripts.dev: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd app && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules app/node_modules backend/node_modules app/dist backend/dist

author: Your Name <your.email@example.com>
